daily_pass_streak_min.rationale: Normal publication still requires repeated independent daily passes after the research-validity contract has already cleared.

bootstrap_daily_pass_streak_min.rationale: Bootstrap tasks still need a materially longer longitudinal record before any publishable handling is allowed.

bootstrap_walk_forward_window_count_min.rationale: Bootstrap tasks must still show at least two independent walk-forward windows before they can escape archive-only handling on publication semantics.
